ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-01-2010 Continued To Jun-01-10 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: Aaron H. Darsky, Esq., appearing specially for Plaintiff. Appearance for Defendant and Cross-Complainant Anchorage Holdings. Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq., appearing specially for Defendant and Cross-Complainant Ace Parking. The OSC is re-set to 6/1/2010 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings not reported. (212)

Ntc And Motion To Compel Answers To Interrogatories And For Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-08-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearance:
SIERRA J. SPITZER, ESQ., (619)236-8821, FOR THE Defendant/Cross-Complainant/Cross-Defendant/MOVING PARTY, Ace Parking Management, Inc. (APPEARED TELEPHONICALLY)
NO APPEARANCE WAS MADE BY THE PLAINTIFF/OPPOSING PARTY

TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED AS FOLLOWS: Defendant/Cross-Complainant/Cross-Defendant Ace Parking Management, Inc.'s Motion To Compel Answers To Interrogatories is moot as responses have been served. The court will not determine the adequacy of those responses on this motion. The late responses were a misuse of the discovery process.
